description: CDP target discovery/open/attach, session-bound overlay injection, stop/re-inject, recoverable target state, and optional debug CLI helpers.

userStories.title: Extract reusable CDP target helpers for annotations
userStories.description: As a browser engineer, I want shared CDP helpers so that annotation flows reuse existing debug-web infrastructure instead of duplicating it.
acceptanceCriteria: Review existing debug web and Browser Use CDP code before editing
Add or extract helpers for listing targets, opening a URL, attaching to a target, evaluating scripts, and detecting target close/reload state
Existing pibo debug web behavior remains unchanged
Focused tests or smoke checks pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented shared CDP client/target helpers in src/tools/cdp-client.ts and kept debug-web using the extracted client.

userStories.title: Implement URL annotation binding API
userStories.description: As a Chat Web user, I want to enter a URL and create a session-bound browser target for annotation.
acceptanceCriteria: Add authenticated API/service operation to create a binding for a URL from the active Pibo Session and Room
Open or attach a CDP target for the URL and persist binding metadata with owner scope, session id, room id, URL, target id when known, and created time
Return concise errors for invalid URL, CDP unavailable, or target creation failure
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented WebAnnotationCdpService URL binding and same-origin API POST /api/web-annotations/bindings with URL validation and concise errors.

userStories.title: Implement existing target attach binding API
userStories.description: As a Chat Web user, I want to attach an already-open browser target so that I can annotate current page state.
acceptanceCriteria: Add authenticated API/service operation to list reachable CDP targets with bounded title, URL, and target id fields
Add operation to bind one explicitly selected target to the active Pibo Session and Room
Do not inject into targets that were not selected
Failed injection or attach leaves no active binding or marks it recoverable according to store contract
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented bounded target listing and explicit existing-target binding through service/API.

userStories.title: Implement overlay inject stop and reinject
userStories.description: As a user, I want annotation mode injected, stopped, and restored after reload without losing existing annotations.
acceptanceCriteria: Inject the overlay script only into the target associated with the authorized binding
Pass scoped binding configuration/token to the overlay without exposing trusted owner/session fields as editable client data
Implement stop/remove overlay where possible and record injection state
Implement re-inject for an existing binding after reload or overlay disappearance
Focused tests or browser checks pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented authorized binding inject/reinject/stop operations with recoverable closed-target state and browser smoke coverage.

userStories.title: Add optional progressive debug-web annotation helpers
userStories.description: As an operator, I want optional CLI helpers only if they reuse the same store and preserve progressive discovery.
acceptanceCriteria: If included, add pibo debug web annotation commands for start/list/show/resolve or equivalent using compact help and next-command guidance
If deferred, document the defer decision in the PRD README or change docs
CLI helpers reuse the Web Annotation binding/store service and do not create a separate persistence path
Focused tests pass if CLI is added
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Deferred dedicated debug-web annotation CLI; defer decision remains documented in PRD README/capability docs and no separate persistence path was added.

userStories.title: Validate CDP binding lifecycle in browser fixtures
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I want browser checks for target binding and injection so that reloads and closed targets are recoverable.
acceptanceCriteria: Validate URL annotation flow on a local static HTML page in a Docker compute worker
Validate existing-target attach flow on a local React dev page in a Docker compute worker
Verify stop and re-inject behavior after page reload
Verify target close reports a recoverable state and does not delete annotations
Browser verification passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Validated CDP binding lifecycle in the Docker worker on 2026-05-17: URL binding/inject/stop/reinject after reload on a local static HTML fixture, explicit existing-target attach/inject on a local Vite React fixture, and closed-target recoverable state with annotation persistence after target close. Docker worker typecheck, build, and focused tests passed.
